_comment: PYR3-023 BE 4K parity gate per-fixture thresholds (vs kotlin v1.1 SHOWCASE_4K JPGs). Calibrated 2026-05-27 from one v0.17 run; variance is sub-0.01 R at 3B-sample-class quality. Thresholds = round(measured + 2.0); the 248.22289 entry is loose pending PYR3-029 chaos-game fix (it will tighten alongside PYR3-017/021/024 closure).
